title: 🔄 The Song Loop: Uncovering the Dark Truth
hook: Have you ever caught yourself repeating the same song over and over and wondered why?
script: Have you ever caught yourself repeating the same song over and over and wondered why? Brain patterns lock in. Dopamine releases. Pleasure associates. Hooks stick. And you're trapped. In a loop of familiarity. The mind craves comfort. Your brain is making that decision now, and it's why you repeat the same song over and over and wonder why

title: 🔁 The Song Loop: Mind Control 🎶
hook: Have you ever caught yourself repeating the same song over and over and wondered why?
script: Have you ever caught yourself repeating the same song over and over and wondered why? Your brain is addicted to patterns. Same melodies, same rhythms. Dopamine release. Pleasure loop. Every repeat fuels the craving. Songs are mental parasites. They hijack your mind. And now, you're trapped in the loop, forever bound to the same song, and you're repeating it again
